text.title: COLD DESERT in PAKISTAN 🇵🇰 - (unreal landscape) | S8, EP73
text.u: Shukria. I'm just going to go for it.
Good morning internet. It is a4 to 7 in
the morning and welcome back to the
channel. Welcome here in the north of
Pakistan with an amazing view on the
Nonga Parbat. This is actually the ninth
tallest mountain in the world and the
second tallest in Pakistan after K2 of
course and Nonga Parbat in Kashmiri
means naked mountain because the slopes
of the mountain have absolutely no
vegetation but in Shina language which
is the local language here. In a
previous video I also talked about how
many different languages there are in
this part of Pakistan. Anyway, in the
local language, they call this mountain
Deomir, which means mountain of the
gods. But it also has the nickname
killer mountain because so many people
breakfast with a view. Look at the state
after the last ride. She's a little bit
Okay. So, I'm riding to Scardu today. It
kilometers. Look how beautiful it is
here. And Scardu is uh is at a bit
I'm excited about this ride because
H from here you can see the Nanga pabat
goats to some area where they can eat
which in this area not so easy to find.
I think it's just the cliffs are too
down. There has been a landslide here
but we can't see the asphalt
Yeah, this road is a one way in, one way
out. So when it gets blocked and
uh I'm stuck on the other
right? And yeah, I really like riding in
the mornings. Now I don't really have to
anymore because it's not to escape the

block that wasn't there before. You see
imagine? That's the end of the story. If
there also came down. They're just
me that on the other side every now and
then I see like a little house.
there there is no road. I don't know if

Well, right there in the distance, I can
glazier. Okay, now the view is blocked
back. You can see it better from

tar. Let's ride a little bit on dirt.
goes. I love how the valley is just
And the clouds are hiding it a little
bit, but those mountains all have snow
well. You see, it's getting a little
here. It's all erosion from the
There's also sand dunes in this area.
See, they also have little terraces
Hi. Everybody is smiling at me.
Yeah. Looks like they are working on

Shukria. It's always good to get up to
wood. So, you hear the sand dunes.
Welcome to the Katpana cold desert. So
in winter there is often snow on these
sand dunes and because the altitude here
is over 2200 meters. This is also one of
the highest cold deserts in the world as
side and then it's just surrounded by
Look what a nice little house I

meat. This is I can't remember the name.
I think it's also some meat. This is a
noodle soup. And this is also I don't
know. I'm going to start with the
going to be amazing. There's so many
Yeah, that's delicious. Now, try this
one. Okay, I'm not quite sure what that
was. Let me try this one. I also have no
is. No idea what it tastes like. Yeah,
this one's very nice. So far, I'm rating
this 10 out of 10. 11 out of 10. Okay,
maybe two out of 10. This one, four out
of 10. I still have to try this last
one. Again, I have just no idea what I'm
eating. This is really nice. Tastes a
bit like bread in some strange way. I
would rate it five out of 10. What a
ride today. I didn't really have any
expectations of this area, but it blew
all of my expectations. Absolutely loved
it. It was just spectacular. I'm pretty
tired though, so I'm gonna end this
video now. But in the next episode, I'm
going to first explore Scardu a little
bit and then move to another area again.
So that was it for today. I really hope
you like this video. If you did, please
give a big thumbs up, subscribe down
below, and then I'll see you in the next
